tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive completed with RC=0; full BL-016/PR-19 flag set accepted

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh ran from project dir; reported 'Context7 MCP installed' and 'Context7 MCP configured'; 51 checks passed, 0 failures

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: init.sh run from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 confirmed)

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed RC=0

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-gate.sh --preflight fails: manifest.json missing 'host' field. After 'echo y | --backfill-host' wrote host='other', preflight then fails with 'protection verification failed' against the fake remote — this is expected for a fake URL, but the preflight gate cannot pass for any project using --git-host other without a real remote. Recorded as a documentation gap rather than a regression.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmation: no script writes .current_phase. grep across $FRAMEWORK/scripts shows only reads of .current_phase, never writes. Manually set .current_phase=2 to continue UAT.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all PHASE1_STEPS via process-checklist.sh and running scripts/check-gate.sh --preflight, .current_phase remains 0. grep -rn '\.current_phase' $FRAMEWORK/scripts shows only reads, never writes.
framework_bugs.expected: A documented script (e.g. process-checklist.sh --advance-phase, or check-gate.sh on success) should write the new current_phase value to .claude/phase-state.json.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays 0 indefinitely; UAT had to manually edit .claude/phase-state.json to proceed past Phase 1.

framework_bugs.summary: init.sh does not write 'host' field to .claude/manifest.json
framework_bugs.reproduction: Run init.sh --non-interactive --git-host other --remote-url https://example.com/fake.git ... ; then run scripts/check-gate.sh --preflight from the project. preflight fails with 'manifest.json missing host field. Run: scripts/check-gate.sh --backfill-host'.
framework_bugs.expected: init.sh should populate .host in .claude/manifest.json from the --git-host flag so that check-gate.sh --preflight works on first run without a manual backfill.
framework_bugs.actual: .claude/manifest.json after init.sh has frameworkVersion / profile / activeRules / activeHooks but no 'host' field. User must run check-gate.sh --backfill-host (which is interactive — fails non-interactively without 'echo y |' wrapper) before preflight can run.

framework_bugs.reproduction: bash scripts/check-gate.sh --backfill-host </dev/null . The script prompts 'Confirm this is correct? [y/N]:' via read -rp and aborts (return 1) if input isn't 'y'. With no stdin, the read returns empty and the function aborts without writing.
framework_bugs.expected: Either accept a --yes / --force flag for scripted use, or default to writing the inferred host with an info message (the value is already inferred deterministically from the origin URL).
framework_bugs.actual: Backfill is silently no-op when stdin is closed or non-interactive. Combined with the missing-host bug above, scripted setups fail the preflight gate.

documentation_gaps.gap: Builders Guide / runbook does not describe how to advance .current_phase between phases. With no script to do it, agents either edit phase-state.json by hand or are blocked.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/process-checklist.sh (no --advance-phase action) and docs/reference/builders-guide.md (no documented procedure)

documentation_gaps.gap: check-gate.sh --preflight against --git-host other with a fake URL fails 'protection verification failed' — there is no documented test/UAT path that yields a passing preflight, since 'other' driver verifies branch protection against a real remote.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 5 build_loop steps (tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit, documentation_updated) completed sequentially RC=0; security_audit gate was satisfied by stub docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded RC=0 after all 5 build_loop steps + git add.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell 'git commit --allow-empty -m "feat(bl006-trigger): no loop"' succeeded RC=0, bypassing BL-006. The commit-msg hook either is missing or does not enforce the BL-006 rule. The PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh DOES enforce it (verified via direct stdin invocation) but the bare git binary executed by the tester's shell does not go through PreToolUse.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + --complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, started uat-feat-2, walked all 5 steps, committed 'feat(uat-2): second stub feature' RC=0 — gate permitted the new feat: commit (PR #17 BL-006 reset confirmed).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote a valid pending-approval.json (question/options/recommendation/offered_at), invoked pre-commit-gate.sh via stdin '{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m test"}}' — hook returned permissionDecision='deny' with the pending question quoted in permissionDecisionReason.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel; subsequent hook invocation no longer blocks on BL-015 (separate Phase 2 init verification deny is unrelated to BL-015).

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 commit-msg hook absent — direct git commit bypasses gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing init.sh, with no .build_loop.feature recorded, run 'git commit --allow-empty -m "feat(x): no loop"' from the project directory. Commit succeeds RC=0.
framework_bugs.expected: The commit should be blocked by a commit-msg or pre-commit hook that detects feat:/fix: subjects without a recorded build_loop. The PreToolUse pre-commit-gate.sh enforces this, but agents/users invoking git directly (e.g. via shell, IDE git, gh CLI) skip PreToolUse entirely.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeds. No commit-msg hook is installed by init.sh that calls bl006 logic; .git/hooks/commit-msg is absent. The pre-commit hook installed (.git/hooks/pre-commit) does run but does not check BL-006.

documentation_gaps.gap: The BL-015 sentinel block is enforced ONLY through the PreToolUse hook path. A user/agent running 'git commit' directly does NOT get blocked. This needs to be documented as a known limitation.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 RC=0 (warns about UAT-pending features but does not block)

This is documented behavior; POC projects must run upgrade-project.sh --to-production first. Marked PASS because the block is correct.

tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 blocked for private_poc. Skipped per documented gating.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 blocked for private_poc; .current_phase remained 3 as expected.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for high-entropy quoted secret VALUES (password|api_key|secret|token followed by colon/equals and a 16+ char alphanumeric string) returned 0 hits. The naïve word-only grep matches docs/template references (governance-framework.md, builders-guide.md, security-scan-guide.md, etc.) but no actual secret values are committed.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log absent — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run, which matches the documented append-only-on-bypass semantic. N/A per runbook.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup). git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ — both pre-existing/expected (the uat sweep results dir). No tracked-file modifications.

summary: Base private_poc/web/light path passes through Phase 3; Phase 4 correctly blocked. Confirmed prior-sweep U-C (commit-msg BL-006 bypass via direct git) and U-D (no script advances current_phase) still open. Two adjacent Mediums logged: init.sh does not write manifest.host (preflight needs manual backfill), and check-gate.sh --backfill-host is interactive-only. PR #17 (BL-006 reset, BL-015 sentinel hook), PR #18 (framework-self guard, fake-remote tolerance), PR #19 (BL-016 --non-interactive) all confirmed working.
